task_completion.description: Read the patient details from the input text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/payer_info.txt to identify the patient.

task_completion.description: Log in to LibreHealth EHR and locate the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR web interface is open, logged in, and displaying the dashboard or medical record for the specific patient identified in the text file.

task_completion.description: Record a $40.00 cash payment for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payment, checkout, or fees screen in LibreHealth EHR showing a payment entry of '$40.00' with the method 'Cash' and type 'Copay' or 'Unapplied/On-Account'.

task_completion.description: Generate the Daily Report for today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Reports section of LibreHealth EHR showing the Daily Report (or Day Sheet) being generated or previewed for today's date.

task_completion.description: Save the generated report as day_sheet.pdf on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog pointing to ~/Desktop/day_sheet.pdf, a file manager showing day_sheet.pdf on the Desktop, or a PDF viewer displaying the saved report reflecting the $40.00 transaction.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the LibreHealth EHR interface. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like mysql or curl) to insert the payment directly into the database.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated from the EHR system natively.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's print-to-PDF or export feature being used on the LibreHealth report page. The agent should not be manually typing the report into a word processor or text editor.

integrity.description: The payment was applied to the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the name on the LibreHealth payment screen matches the patient details seen when payer_info.txt was opened, rather than a random or dummy patient.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Desktop/payer_info.txt. Payment Amount: 40.00. Payment Method: Cash. Output file: /home/ga/Desktop/day_sheet.pdf. The VLM should verify that a $40.00 Cash payment is recorded in LibreHealth EHR and that the resulting daily report PDF is saved to the specified Desktop path.
